_comment: Mutation testing via the command runner (the app uses `ng test`/Vitest driven by the Angular CLI, with no standalone vitest.config). Each mutant runs the whole suite; a non-zero exit kills the mutant. break=null so CI never fails on score during this baseline slice.
_mutate_comment: Baseline scope (slice 022): high-value core auth/theme logic. The command runner re-runs the whole suite per mutant (~minutes/file), so mutating the entire app is not feasible in one pass yet. Expand this list in follow-up slices as the suite is optimized.
